headline: Ravens Regime: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Ravens Regime carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 80.09, led by Lamar Jackson, Tyler Warren, and Derrick Henry. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the RB slot currently occupied by Kyle Monangai (55.6 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Lamar Jackson (97.2), Tyler Warren (97.2), and Derrick Henry (92.8). That concentration gives Ravens Regime a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Kyle Monangai is the lowest C-AVI starter at 55.6. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 9 offensive players, leaving 1 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 80.34, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 9 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
